gaps: A termination signal for fee-default closures ('Case considered closed' after an IFP denial) in cert_signals/outcome forming, so already-over cases stop reaching predictors as open forward cells
A statpack cut for petitions whose respondent is a court (mandamus-style petitions) would sharpen priors for this recurring pro se profile
helpful: statpack.json per-fee-class detail (IFP: 0 grants of 62 resolved this Term) was the single most decisive prior
Provisioned petition.txt/questions-presented.txt made the non-certworthy QP assessment trivial without any fetching
fedcourts query --disposition dismissed clarified what the corpus's 'dismissed' label actually covers, which settled the dismissed-vs-denied call
notes: Forward cell, but the provisioned snapshot already contained the effective outcome (IFP denied, fee never paid, case closed Jan 15 2026) - flagged separately. One ranged corpus query (214 GETs, ~56 MB) was enough; no MCP/REST retrieval was needed or appropriate given the closure was already in the baseline.
